output.summary: Two revision changes: (1) Restructure fade masks so they only cover the swiper/slides area, not the pagination/navigation controls above. (2) Fix vertical padding inside the charcoal background area to match Figma's 96px inner padding (currently missing container-level py).

fileChanges.description: Fix fade mask scope and container padding
fileChanges.details:
1. FADE MASK FIX: Move the two fade mask divs (.testimonials-fade-left, .testimonials-fade-right) from inside .swiper-parent to inside a new wrapper div that ONLY wraps the .swiper element (not the pagination/nav row). Create a new relative wrapper around just the .swiper and the fade masks. Structure change:

   CURRENT:
   .swiper-parent (relative, overflow-hidden)
     > pagination/nav row
     > .swiper
     > .testimonials-fade-left (absolute, top-0 bottom-0)
     > .testimonials-fade-right (absolute, top-0 bottom-0)

   NEW:
   .swiper-parent (overflow-hidden)
     > pagination/nav row
     > .swiper-slides-wrapper (relative, overflow-hidden)   <-- NEW wrapper
       > .swiper
       > .testimonials-fade-left (absolute, top-0 bottom-0)
       > .testimonials-fade-right (absolute, top-0 bottom-0)

   The new .swiper-slides-wrapper div gets classes: 'relative overflow-hidden grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1'
   The .swiper-parent loses 'relative' (no longer needed for absolute mask positioning) but keeps 'overflow-hidden grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1'

2. PADDING FIX: Add vertical padding to the container div to match Figma's 96px inner content padding within the charcoal card.
   - Add 'py-16 md:py-24' to the container div (64px mobile, 96px desktop).
   - Figma shows the outer section has py-64px (currently py-10 sm:py-16 = 40px/64px -- keep as-is for outer spacing).
   - Figma shows the charcoal Content area has py-96px inner padding. Currently there is 0 padding on the container itself. Adding md:py-24 (96px) gives the correct inner padding at desktop. Using py-16 (64px) for mobile is a reasonable responsive fallback since the outer section already has py-10 on mobile.

fileChanges.description: Match container padding change in editor preview
fileChanges.details:
Update the container div className to add 'py-16 md:py-24' matching the PHP change. The container div currently has:
  className="container relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8"
Change to:
  className="container relative py-16 md:py-24 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8"

Note: The fade mask restructure does NOT need to be replicated in TSX because the carousel area is rendered via FilteredServerSideRender (SSR). The TSX only renders the ThemeHeading directly; the swiper-parent and its contents come from PHP via SSR.

fileChanges.description: Update fade mask JS selectors for new DOM structure
fileChanges.details:
The MutationObserver and initial-state code (lines 71-94) queries fade mask elements within the parent (.swiper-parent). After the restructure, the fade masks are inside .swiper-slides-wrapper (a child of .swiper-parent). The querySelector calls on parent still work because querySelector searches descendants, so '.testimonials-fade-left' and '.testimonials-fade-right' will still be found.

HOWEVER, the data-at-beginning/data-at-end attributes are set on .swiper-parent. The MutationObserver is observing .swiper-parent for attribute changes. This still works correctly.

No JS changes needed -- the existing querySelector calls are descendant queries that will find the fade masks regardless of their nesting depth within .swiper-parent.

designDecisions.decision: Create a new .swiper-slides-wrapper div inside .swiper-parent that wraps only the .swiper element and the fade mask divs. This isolates the fade masks to only cover the slides area.
designDecisions.evidence: User reported fade masks overlap pagination/navigation controls. Current structure has absolute-positioned masks inside .swiper-parent which spans the full height including the controls row.

designDecisions.decision: Add py-16 md:py-24 to the container div to achieve 96px inner padding within the charcoal background area at desktop.
designDecisions.evidence: Figma node I785:34805;634:40724 (Content) shows py-[var(--margin/margin-7,96px)]. Current implementation has 0 padding on the container -- only the outer section has py-10 sm:py-16. The 96px maps to Tailwind py-24.

designDecisions.decision: Keep section outer padding as py-10 sm:py-16 (40px/64px). This represents the transparent spacing outside the charcoal card.
designDecisions.evidence: Figma node 785:34805 (outer Testimonial wrapper) shows py-[var(--margin/margin-5,64px)]. sm:py-16 = 64px matches correctly. The mobile py-10 (40px) is a reasonable responsive reduction.
